q: Swiftlets are tiny birds. However, they can spend ten months in flight without taking a break. (Join the sentences, beginning with 'Although'.) 2025
a: Although swiftlets are tiny birds, they can spend ten months in flight without taking a break.

q: You will not be allowed to go into the library if you do not have your personal library card. (Rewrite using 'Without + V_ing'.) 2025, 2025, 2024, 2026
a: Without having your personal library card, you will not be allowed to go into the library.
